source: Drik Panchang (drikpanchang.com) — independent capture; Lahiri ayanamsa, MEAN nodes
derivation_notes: tithi/yoga/karana computed independently from the reference longitudes:
elongation = (302.637 - 77.846) mod 360 = 224.791 -> tithi floor(224.791/12)+1 = 19 = Krishna Chaturthi
karana K = floor(224.791/6) = 37 -> movable cycle (37-1) mod 7 = 1 -> Balava
nakshatra: 302.637/13.3333 -> index 22 (Dhanishta); 9.304 deg into it -> pada 3
vara: birth 01:25 local precedes Saturday's ~04:49 sunrise, so the Vedic day is still Friday -> Shukravara
